temporal_description: A medium shot captures a dimly lit, gritty interior. The scene is set in a dimly lit, possibly industrial or older building. The walls are made of dirty, off-white tiles. On the wall behind the men, two framed pictures hang, and a red diamond-shaped decoration is affixed to a dark door. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot that frames the group's interaction. The audio begins with a man speaking in a calm, slightly questioning tone, as if making an observation. He says, "他们来了" (They're here). In the foreground, a man with dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket over a black shirt, looks off to the right with a serious expression. Behind him, another man in a dark jacket is partially visible. The atmosphere is tense and quiet, with no background music, focusing entirely on the dialogue and the sounds of the characters' movements. A woman with dark hair, wearing a sparkly, patterned jacket, enters the frame from the right, smiling and gesturing with her hands. Immediately following, a group of people erupts into a loud, high-pitched, and excited cheer, their voices overlapping in a cacophony of greeting and surprise. The group of men turns to greet her. The woman continues to smile and clap as she interacts with an older man who has white hair and is wearing a light-colored suit. The men in the background watch the greeting. The dialogue is fast-paced and filled with energy, suggesting a long-awaited arrival. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera is static, keeping the focus on the group's dynamic interaction.
